blockers.detail: agents/src/trader/ does not exist; only the firefly agent lives under agents/src/. The `trader` CLI command is not registered in agents/pyproject.toml.

yfinance HTTP requests return CONNECT tunnel failed / 403 from the remote execution environment proxy for all tickers (NVDA, AAPL, TSLA, MSFT, AMD, GOOGL, META, AMZN). External financial data APIs are blocked in this sandbox.
With no trader CLI, LLM_BACKEND fallback path could not be exercised.

note: Stub produced per blocker protocol. See wiki/synthesis/daily-trader-2026-07-20.md for full report.
